other_observers: Brandon Percival, Rachel Hopper, Larry Semo; Brandon Percival found this bird a week ago
description: This was a cormorant by the dark plumage, long neck and tail and by habit of perching next to the water on exposed limbs sticking out of the water.  The cormorant was distant but the silhouette showed a smallish rounded head, dark back and breast, and a longish tail. The face pattern, especially the gular pouch shape and color was not visible at this distance.Behaviors: Perched on stick over the water.Call: none heardPlumage: adult
